derivedSiteCapacity.note: 0.56 ac x 36 units/ac = ~20 units before any density bonus.

standardsCitations.maxHeightFt: Austin LDC §25-2-562 (MF-3 district regulations); verified headline in docs/property_ground_truth.md
standardsCitations.maxDensityUnitsPerAcre: Austin LDC §25-2-562 (MF-3 district regulations); verified headline in docs/property_ground_truth.md
standardsCitations.siteDevelopmentStandards: Austin LDC §25-2-491 (site development regulations / dimensional standards table referenced by the MF district regulations) via the Austin LDC code corpus

provenance.corpus: Austin LDC code corpus (Municode productId 15303, Land Development Code)
provenance.produced: MF-3 district dimensional standards (height, density, FAR, coverage, impervious, setbacks)
provenance.citation: Austin Land Development Code §25-2-562 (MF-3 district regulations) and §25-2-491 (site development regulations).
Cherrywood Neighborhood Association land use terms; docs/property_ground_truth.md

reasoning: The MF-3 (Multifamily Residence Medium Density) standards were produced by querying the Austin LDC code corpus in hauska-engine (search_atoms over the Municode-ingested LDC, then get_atom on the §25-2-562 code-section atom and the §25-2-491 site-development table). The headline height (40 ft) and density (36 units/acre) match the verified facts in docs/property_ground_truth.md. FAR (0.75:1), building coverage (50%), impervious cover (60%), and setbacks are the Austin MF-3 site-development standards carried by the same corpus and are surfaced with their citation rather than hand-asserted. Derived site capacity (~20 units on 0.56 ac before bonuses) is computed from density x lot area.

confidence.stateNote: Headline height/density cross-checked against ground-truth doc; full dimensional set sourced from the Austin LDC code corpus with section citations. Not earned-calibrated on Mox outcomes.
